tasks.subject: Task 1: Router guard confines non-admins during maintenance
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When maintenance is on, redirect every non-admin (authenticated or not) to `/maintenance`, except when navigating to `logout` or `login` with the `admin` query flag.

**Files:**
- Modify: `dashboard/src/router/index.ts` (maintenance block in `installGuard`)
- Test: `dashboard/src/router/guard.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- unauthenticated /login redirects to /maintenance during maintenance
- /login?admin=1 allowed through
- authenticated non-admin app route redirects to /maintenance
- admin passes through
- maintenance off /maintenance redirects to /login
- existing guard tests pass

**Verify:** `cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/router/guard.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/router/index.ts", "dashboard/src/router/guard.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/router/guard.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["unauthenticated /login redirects to /maintenance", "/login?admin=1 allowed", "authenticated non-admin redirected to /maintenance", "admin passes through", "maintenance off /maintenance to /login", "existing guard tests pass"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: MaintenanceView admin-sign-in link + i18n
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a quiet 'Administrator sign-in' link on `MaintenanceView` (shown to unauthenticated visitors) pointing to `/login?admin=1`, localized in en and zh.

**Files:**
- Modify: `dashboard/src/pages/MaintenanceView.vue`
- Modify: `dashboard/src/locales/en.ts`, `dashboard/src/locales/zh.ts`
- Test: `dashboard/src/pages/MaintenanceView.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- unauthenticated shows /login?admin=1 link with adminSignIn label
- authenticated hides admin link and shows sign-out
- adminSignIn key in en.ts and zh.ts
- en.ts quotes are ASCII (grep clean)

**Verify:** `cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/pages/MaintenanceView.test.ts`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/src/pages/MaintenanceView.vue", "dashboard/src/locales/en.ts", "dashboard/src/locales/zh.ts", "dashboard/src/pages/MaintenanceView.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && npx vitest run src/pages/MaintenanceView.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["unauthenticated shows admin link", "authenticated hides admin link", "adminSignIn in en+zh", "en.ts quotes ASCII"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Done-gate — full gate + rebuild & commit dist
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Run the project's green gate and commit the rebuilt embedded `dist`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `dashboard/dist/**`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- full vitest passes
- npm run build clean (vue-tsc + vite)
- check-contrast passes
- go build -tags nodynamic + go vet pass
- dist rebuilt and committed

**Verify:** `cd dashboard && npx vitest run && npm run build && node scripts/check-contrast.mjs`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["dashboard/dist"], "verifyCommand": "cd dashboard && npx vitest run && npm run build && node scripts/check-contrast.mjs", "acceptanceCriteria": ["full vitest passes", "npm run build clean", "check-contrast passes", "go build + vet pass", "dist committed"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
